title: Metatranscriptomics sample preparation protocol with ScriptSeq
author: Ed DeLong
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.dib4am
materials: miRNA Homogenate Additive (2M sodium acetate, PH 4)

steps.title: Thaw tube and prepare solutions
steps.instruction: Thaw 2-ml screw-cap tube on ice (should take a while). If using sterivex filters, follow notes in annotations. Preparation: - Add 21 ml of ACS grade 100% ethanol to Wash Solution 1, and mix well. - Add 40 ml of ACS grade 100% ethanol to Wash Solution 2/3, and mix well. - Make sure the Acid-Phenol:Chloroform is not more than 6-month old.

steps.title: Remove RNAlater
steps.instruction: Lyse the cells on the filters: Remove the 300 µl RNAlater carefully and discard.

steps.title: Add Lysis/Binding buffer and vortex
steps.instruction: Add 750 µl (1.5mL)* Lysis/Binding buffer, vortex vigorously to completely lyse the cells. *If using sterivex filters: add 1.5mL

steps.title: Add miRNA Homogenate Additive
steps.instruction: Add 75 µl (150 µl)* miRNA Homogenate Additive. Vortex to mix. *If using sterivex filters: Add 150 µl Homogenate Additive: 2M sodium acetate, PH 4; the sodium acetate buffer helps maintain the pH of the denatured cell lysate during acid extraction and provides the salt necessary for RNA precipitation later.

steps.title: Incubate on ice
steps.instruction: Leave the mixture on ice for 10 min.

steps.title: Transfer lysate
steps.instruction: Transfer the 825 µl lysate to a new Non-stick RNase-free tube or a 2 mL tube with o-ring (might need to spin the tubes to get as much lysate out as possible). If using sterivex filters, split lysate equally into two tubes.

steps.title: Add Acid-Phenol:Chloroform and vortex
steps.instruction: Add 750 µl Acid-Phenol:Chloroform, vortex for 30-60 sec to mix.

steps.title: Centrifuge for phase separation
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 min at maximum 10,000 X g at RT. After centrifugation, the interphase should be compact, if not, repeat centrifugation.

steps.title: Transfer aqueous phase
steps.instruction: Carefully remove the top aqueous phase w/o disturbing the lower phase, transfer it to a fresh tube. The volume of the aqueous phase should be similar to initial volume of Lysis/Binding buffer.

steps.title: Pre-heat Elution Solution
steps.instruction: Pre-heat Elution Solution (or Nuclease-free water) to 95ºC.

steps.title: Add ethanol and load to filter
steps.instruction: Add 1.25 volumes of RT 100% ethanol to the aqueous phase, mix well, load to a Filter Cartridge in the collection tube (provided).

steps.title: Centrifuge and discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 sec at 10,000 X g, discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Wash with miRNA Wash Solution 1
steps.instruction: Apply 700 µl miRNA Wash Solution 1 to the Filter Cartridge and centrifuge for 10 sec at 10,000 X g, discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Wash with Wash Solution 2/3
steps.instruction: Apply 500 µl Wash Solution 2/3, spin 15 sec at 10,000 X g, and discard the flow-through.

steps.title: Repeat Wash with Wash Solution 2/3
steps.instruction: Repeat step 13 (Apply 500 µl Wash Solution 2/3, spin 15 sec at 10,000 X g, and discard the flow-through).

steps.title: Dry filter cartridge
steps.instruction: Put the Filter Cartridge back in the tube, centrifuge for 1.5 min at 10,000 X g to remove residual fluid from the filter.

steps.title: Elute RNA (first application)
steps.instruction: Transfer the Filter Cartridge into a fresh collection tube, apply 50 µl pre-heated (95 ºC) Elution Solution (0.1 mM EDTA) to the center of the filter.

steps.title: Incubate for elution
steps.instruction: Wait ~1 minute.

steps.title: Centrifuge for elution
steps.instruction: Spin for 30 sec at 10,000 X g.

steps.title: Repeat Elution
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 16-18 (applying another 50 µl pre-heated (95ºC) Elution Solution, waiting ~1 minute, and spinning for 30 sec).
